author: Tautik Agrahari
summary: Autonomous research agent — honest benchmark results. Theme: equalised the frontier where the signal allowed; no fabricated wins.

proteingym_dms_indels.metric: official grouped Average Spearman (per-assay -> mean within UniProt x category -> mean across categories)

results.verdict: TIE / equalised the #1 — matched, does NOT beat (margin within/near scorer error)

proteingym_dms_indels.note: Consensus = rank-average of all 23 non-PoET published zero-shot models. Signal-bound: PoET's edge is MSA/family conditioning not reproducible by open PLMs. An earlier 0.526 was an overfit (leakage) and is retracted.

matbench_discovery.reason: CPS weights kappa_SRME 40%; every open non-#1 model's kappa (0.118-0.173) >> #1's 0.094; no legal inference-only combination clears it.
matbench_discovery.retraction: An earlier 'CPS 0.9088 win' averaged other teams' published predictions and was retracted — not a submittable category, not a win.

arc_agi_2.verdict: real measured result, NOT a submittable record
arc_agi_2.reason: offline record forbids frontier APIs (our approach uses one); public SOTA ~95% with heavier scaffolds; verified record not self-submittable. A genuine record needs ARC-2-specific training + test-time training (multi-week).

honesty_principles: reproduce the published baseline exactly before trusting the scorer
no leakage — validate wins on held-out data, never tune to eval labels
provenance — first-party only, no stitching others' published outputs
feasibility check before spending; an earned negative is a valid result
